description: Installs DBeaver Community Edition -- universal database visualization and management tool. Optionally syncs connection profiles and settings.

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notInPath: DBeaver installed but dbeaver-cli not found in PATH (may need shell restart)
messages.disabled: DBeaver install is disabled in config
messages.settingsSynced: DBeaver settings synced -- {count} item(s) copied to {path}
messages.settingsSkipped: DBeaver settings sync skipped -- no source files found
messages.exportNoSource: DBeaver data directory not found -- has DBeaver been launched at least once?
messages.exportNoFiles: No config files found in DBeaver data directory -- nothing to export
messages.exportComplete: DBeaver settings exported -- {count} item(s) saved to {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.install: Install DBeaver Community Edition + sync settings (default)
commands.export: Export DBeaver settings from machine to repo for backup
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
